mapper.select: SELECT * FROM progress WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC
SELECT * FROM progress WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND chapter_id = #{chapterId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO progress (user_id, chapter_id, status, score, study_time, last_study_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{chapterId}, #{status}, #{score}, #{studyTime}, #{lastStudyTime})
